title: artifact-manifest
description: artifact-manifest.json — the canonical description of one deployment's static artifact bundle (PRD 0008 §9.2 with the report-0010 naming: artifactBasePath, schemaVersion, environment). Written by anvilkit-export-worker to {artifactBasePath}/artifact-manifest.json; read by cdn-service, which maps each files[].path to the CDN root (PRD 0008 §9.4) and preserves per-file cacheControl. The manifest object itself is INTERNAL-ONLY (private, max-age=0, no-store) and is never uploaded to public CDN paths. routes[] is always an array (FR-012 invariant) — route data lives here, not in the deployment.artifact.ready event (ADR-001). Additive evolution only — removing or renaming a field requires a schema version bump (FR-002).

version.description: Published version the artifact was rendered from (version-pinned)

artifactBasePath.description: Storage base path — every files[].storageKey lives under it (sites/{siteId}/deployments/{deploymentId}, FR-010)

entry.description: Primary route entry, e.g. /home/index.html. For multi-page (P1-001) routes[] is authoritative and entry points at the canonical route.

files.description: Every object in the artifact bundle (the manifest itself is excluded)

path.description: Artifact-relative serving path — cdn-service uploads the object to this path at the CDN root (PRD 0008 §9.4)

contentHash.description: SHA-256 content hash, sha256-<hex> — matches the object's x-amz-meta-content-sha256 metadata (never an S3 ETag)

cacheControl.description: Per-class cache policy (PRD 0008 §9.3): HTML public, max-age=60, stale-while-revalidate=300 · hashed assets public, max-age=31536000, immutable · non-hashed public, max-age=3600

routes.description: Route table — ALWAYS an array (FR-012 invariant); single-page MVP has exactly one entry
